Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins

package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins
  • Class
    Description
    ClientPrivilegedI
    The interface ClientPrivilegedI declares the method signatures through which a publication/subscription system privileged user manages the its channels.
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin
    Plugin client implémentant les opérations de gestion de canaux privilégiés (CDC §3.5.2).
    ClientPublicationI
    The interface ClientPublicationI declares the signatures of methods that a client publication plug-in must implement.
    ClientPublicationPlugin
    Plugin client implémentant les opérations de publication (CDC §3.5).
    ClientRegistrationI
    The class ClientRegistrationI
    ClientRegistrationPlugin
    Plugin client implémentant les opérations d'enregistrement (CDC §3.5).
    ClientSubscriptionI
    The interface ClientSubscriptionI declares the signatures of methods that a client subscription plug-in must implement.
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin
    Plugin client implémentant les opérations de souscription (CDC §3.5), y compris l'API de réception avancée (CDC §3.5.3).
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.MessageDeliveryHandler
    Owner-side callback for received messages.
